razor_choke.name: Razor Choke
razor_choke.flavor: Tightens the shot pattern to a single brutal line.

spread_amp.name: Spread Amplifier
spread_amp.flavor: Blooms the cone wide enough to sweep a corridor.

hush_shroud.name: Hush Shroud
hush_shroud.flavor: Polymer-baffled barrel sleeve. Quiet enough that the rumour wire doesn't pick it up.

precision_bore.name: Precision Bore
precision_bore.flavor: Hand-rifled inner. Unpopular with armourers, beloved by patient shooters.

void_resonator.name: Void Resonator
void_resonator.flavor: Salvaged from upper-deck security. The shot makes a sound that doesn't belong on this ship.

rivet_edge.name: Rivet Edge
rivet_edge.flavor: Branwen-style edge work. Holds a line through Iron and bone alike.

ghost_grip.name: Ghost Grip
ghost_grip.flavor: Polymer wrap that doesn't catch on cloth or memory.

marrow_thread.name: Marrow Thread
marrow_thread.flavor: Clinic-grade neural fibre woven through the lining. Heals you. Quietly bills you.

weight_shed_mesh.name: Weight-Shed Mesh
weight_shed_mesh.flavor: Strip-mesh lining. Trades a little protection for a little less mass.

iron_plate_layer.name: Iron Plate Layer
iron_plate_layer.flavor: Branwen-cut Iron sewn into the lining. Heavy. Reassuring.

vibe_layer.name: Vibe Layer
vibe_layer.flavor: Cut and dye that reads to the Club Syndicate as 'I belong in this booth, do not ask'.

subdermal_cooler.name: Subdermal Cooler
subdermal_cooler.flavor: Active heat-sink layer. Costs a little, hides a lot.

wiretap_inset.name: Wiretap Inset
wiretap_inset.flavor: Embedded courier tap. Half illegal, half indispensable.

edge_bias.name: Edge Bias
edge_bias.flavor: Reflex calibration biased for the bad option, slightly faster than the good one.

halen_coil_signature.name: Halen-Coil Signature
halen_coil_signature.flavor: Halen-Coil pre-Crisis manufacturing mark. Anyone who knows what it means treats you slightly better.
